name: dialog-close-button
visual_summary: A small, typically circular or square icon that closes a dialog. A developer would use this component when they need to provide a clear way to dismiss a dialog box, allowing users to interact with the main UI. It is usually used in situations where multiple dialogues are open and the user needs to switch between them.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: dialog-close-button
Description: A small, typically circular or square icon that closes a dialog. A developer would use this component when they need to provide a clear way to dismiss a dialog box, allowing users to interact with the main UI. It is usually used in situations where multiple dialogues are open and the user needs to switch between them.
Style: e.g. dark, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. clickable
Tags: dialog, dismiss, button

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
